lang.text: The thought starts to become a plan, then refuses to remain one. This is a bad idea for reasons that are not deja vu. Someone, somewhere in the loop that you allowed near your mind, is quietly helping you notice that.
Integrated Population
The total number of people Integrated in this timeline.
First Integration Turn
The turn on which the first humans were Integrated in this timeline.
Bloom Incubation Turn
The turn on which conditions first favored the escaped replication-capable mass.
Bloom-Held Buildings
The number of buildings currently held by the Grey Bloom.
Bloom Peak Buildings
The largest number of buildings the Grey Bloom has held at once in this timeline.
Espia Clock Start
The turn Espia Telecom's pattern suite flagged the trial families.
Espia Leverage
Material copied from Espia Telecom's own locked drawers.
Public Scandal Until Turn
While the published story runs, voluntary Integration recruitment is slowed.
Vorsiber Clock Start
The turn Vorsiber's awareness reports graduated their footnotes.
Vorsiber Decoy Turn
The turn of the staged demonstration.
Integration Available Turn
The turn Replicative Safeguards made Integration possible.
Tark Program Turn
The turn Tark Defense Systems started its crash replication program.
Tark Escape Turn
The turn Tark's replicator escaped its unlisted subsidiary lab.
Exalter Intake Turn
The turn the Exalter faithful began their intake.
Exalter Rebuff Turn
The turn the Exalter delegation was gently declined.
Bloom Contained Turn
The turn the Grey Bloom was contained.
Residue Stir Turn
The turn the dormant residue began checking its hands.
Bloom Confirm Turn
The turn the architecture inference stopped being deniable.
Translation Start Turn
The turn the first boundary lesson was given.
Translation Continue Turn
The turn the translation was carried past the room called consent.
Translation Stop Turn
The turn the lessons were withdrawn.
Subsume Turn
The turn the Bloom's substrate was folded in.
Respect Turn
The turn the boundary was made law.
Fragment Clock Turn
A clock for something that should not have a clock.
Grey Tide Start Turn
The turn you unbound the replication into yourself.
Grey Tide Victory Turn
The turn the last pressure ended, and the descent began.
Mechs Subverted By Grey Goo
Enemy war machines the goo saturated, then turned, then kept.
Buildings Consumed By The Tide
Structures the descent took down to reclaimable mass.
Plots Reclaimed
Consumed plots the Reclamation Weave raised back into working structures.
Outbreak Incoming Turn
The turn the wind first carried the crossover across the rock.
Outbreak Start Turn
The turn the unbound goo erupted in your city.
Unbound Goo Mass
Total mass of the unbound crossover goo across the city.
Emergency Phage Progress
Research poured into a Phage that can eat something you did not design.
Interface Trial Points
Living-tissue edge cases gathered before miniaturizing the nanobot interface.
Nanobot Design Points
Useful pieces of city technology harvested and recombined for nanobot miniaturization.
Total Insight Generated
The total amount of Insight generated by Integrated Humans in this timeline.
Goo Post-Apoc Start Turn
The turn you dropped to a lower form of living.
Grey Mass
Total replicating nanomass. One of the two things your intelligence is now made of.
Structural Computation
How far the goo has annealed into a computer. Slow for a long time, then all at once.
How unified you still are. When it fails, the far selves stop resolving and become strangers.
Harvested Exergy
Usable work pulled from every gradient you straddle. It buys mass, thought, and staying yourself.
Notoriety To The Stars
How badly something very far up wants to burn you off the rock.
Glassing Turn
The turn the bombardment arrived - fire, or fuel.
